import io
import string
import list

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    mut min_val = 0
    match list.min(remaining)
    when Some(v)
      min_val = v
    when None
      ()
    end
    result = list.push(result, min_val)
    mut new_rem: List<Int> = []
    mut removed = false
    mut j = 0
    while j < remaining.len()
      match remaining.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if v == min_val and not removed
          removed = true
        else
          new_rem = list.push(new_rem, v)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    remaining = new_rem
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(text)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut b = -1
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(text, i)
      when Some(x)
        b = x
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    if in_num
      if is_digit
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      else
        let val = sign * current
        if not list.contains(nums, val)
          nums = list.push(nums, val)
        end
        in_num = false
        current = 0
        sign = 1
      end
    else if is_minus
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
      current = 0
    else if is_digit
      sign = 1
      in_num = true
      current = b - 48
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let sorted = sort_asc(nums)
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut k = 0
  while k < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
